# LLO Manager Guide — Turmeric Market Survey (SYNTHETIC)

For LLO operators overseeing FLW deployment of this opportunity.

## What your FLWs are doing

Your FLWs are visiting markets to photograph turmeric vendors with a
standard yellow MTN color-reference card in each photo. They also
collect a short structured form (form, price, origin, appearance) and
deliver a brief educational message. The goal is a geo-tagged dataset
for analysts to flag candidate markets for lab-based adulteration
testing.

## Day-to-day responsibilities

- **Morning check-in:** confirm FLWs have clean MTN cards and working
  phones. Damaged cards make photos unusable.
- **Quality watch:** review the first 5 submissions of each FLW's first
  day. Common issues: MTN card not visible, poor lighting, photo
  cropped. Re-train if needed.
- **Daily cap enforcement:** 20 deliveries per FLW per day; 5 per
  market per day. The app will block submissions once the cap is hit.
- **Escalations:** hostile vendors, safety concerns → contact ACE
  onboarding email; verified adulteration claim → escalate up, do NOT
  diagnose on-site.

## Weekly

- Review FLW Data Review output shared by the ACE onboarding address
- Push back on any per-market saturation patterns (cluster FLWs across
  more markets)

## Payment

Payment is per verified delivery. Verification rules:
- Photo present with MTN card visible (Layer A + Layer B check)
- GPS inside the configured bounding box
- All required form fields populated
